review_comment:
Why this change?
Actually, I'm not sure what this line does at all, since `AccountFinderConcern#find_remote` seems to perform a search with its own scope?
Without this the retrieved model doesn't have an `id` attribute. Scopes are composable.
Is this serializer used for `mentions`? If so, I'm not sure I understand why/how. `REST::StatusSerializer`'s is called `MentionSerializer` so I'm not sure what's different here…?
Status model has a Mention association. Here, we use Account models directly.
